This PR refactors the code for better maintainability.

## Changes
- Refactor database connection pooling
- Updated related documentation and tests
- Verified no breaking changes to existing functionality

## Testing
Added regression tests to prevent future issues.

## Notes
Feedback welcome on the design decisions.
